name: Ministry of Energy and Business Development

minister.name: The Hon. Kerrie D. Symmonds, M.P.
minister.role: Minister of Energy, Business Development and Commerce, and Senior Minister coordinating Productive Sector

items.name: Corporate Affairs and Intellectual Property Office
International Business and Financial Services Unit

children.text: The Energy Division is responsible for all matters related to energy in Barbados. These include:
Matters related to Oil and Gas
Matters related to Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency

bodyText:
The Energy Division is responsible for all matters related to energy in Barbados. These include:

- Energy policy and planning
- Energy Licencing — renewable and non-renewable
- [Renewable Energy Licence](https://energy.gov.bb/?wpdmdl=1885&ind=1616784951507)
- Matters related to Oil and Gas
- Matters related to Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency
- Geology and Mining
